metadata.campaign_title: Russian Gemini CLI Credential Mill (UTA-2026-012) — 213.165.51.115 / US healthcare provider

domains.context: Operator-controlled root domain; all subdomains operator-bound

Russian credential-DB service; operator's mass_wp_mutator.py integrates via API key. Outbound from server-class non-research hosts is high-confidence operator signal.

Gemini Generative Language API; operator's check_keys.py validates stolen keys against /v1beta/models endpoint. Egress signature requires tight scoping (server-class hosts only; key-diversity threshold) to avoid developer-environment FPs.

Webshare proxy IP used by ai_sniper_brute.py for WP brute-force proxy rotation (port 13400, Dutch datacenter range). Operator-shared infrastructure, not operator-owned.
Second Webshare proxy IP used by ai_sniper_brute.py (port 13400, Dutch datacenter range). Operator-shared infrastructure, not operator-owned.

urls.context: Operator's stager PowerShell — first stage of universal infection one-liner
Operator C2 beacon check-in endpoint (GET with X-Agent-ID header)
Operator C2 agent enumeration endpoint (defender-takeover endpoint — unauthenticated GET returns full beacon list to any caller)
Operator C2 command-submission endpoint (POST with agent_id + base64(UTF-16LE) task)
Operator C2 beacon result-return endpoint (POST with base64(UTF-16LE) results)
Client-called endpoint NOT implemented server-side at capture (iterative-dev evidence; missing endpoint indicates operator's C2 codebase is in-progress)
Operator's mass_wp_mutator.py AntiPublic credential-DB lookup endpoint

user_agents.context: Mandatory User-Agent for C2 beacon (per operator's notes, Cloudflare blocks with 403/501 otherwise). CLASS-LEVEL signature — DO NOT use alone; combine with X-Agent-ID header and tralalarkefe.com destination.

http_headers.context: Operator-bespoke HTTP header for beacon identification. Format: HOSTNAME_user (e.g., <VICTIMHOST>_staff). Combined with tralalarkefe.com destination = high-fidelity operator signal.

registry_keys.context: Operator-documented victim-side persistence path per C2_INFRA_TRANSFER.md. The value name 'WindowsUpdateManager' under HKCU\Run is operator-bespoke (legitimate Windows Update does not run under HKCU\Run).

file_paths.context: Operator's primary tooling directory on 213.165.51.115; 4,245 files / 1.43 GB. Contains C2 source, AI tools, credential ledger, victim machine inventory, handoff docs, bulk credential dumps.
Operator's victim-side PowerShell payload directory on 213.165.51.115. Served by c2_server.py's GET /<filename> file-server endpoint (path-traversal vulnerable).
Gemini CLI configuration directory — presence on a server-class host combined with offensive tooling is a high-confidence operator signal. Use as filesystem hunt input.

wmi_artifacts.value: \\.\root\subscription EventConsumer + EventFilter + FilterToConsumerBinding triplet matching stealth.ps1 fileless persistence pattern
wmi_artifacts.context: Operator's stealth.ps1 (per C2_MIGRATION_GUIDE.md) provides WMI + TaskScheduler fileless persistence via __EventConsumer + __EventFilter + __FilterToConsumerBinding triplet. Generic WMI EventConsumer detection signatures apply; specific persistence-event signature pending direct binary analysis of stealth.ps1.

c2_wire_signature.value: HTTP request to *.tralalarkefe.com with User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) + X-Agent-ID: <HOSTNAME>_<user> header + /api/v1/{update,agents,interact,telemetry,get_results} URI + base64(UTF-16LE) body
c2_wire_signature.context: Complete operator C2 wire signature; high-fidelity for SIEM/IDS rule authoring
Operator C2 command/result body encoding scheme; no keyed obfuscation. Defenders can decode commands with two stdlib calls.

powershell_stager_signature.context: Operator's universal infection one-liner (per C2_INFRA_TRANSFER.md). Catches new compromises at infection time.

operator_side_process_signature.context: Operator's persistent victim-side tunnel process argv (Linux operator host); captured live in operator session 2026-03-19T22-26 ps output

credential_mutation_pattern.value: Outbound HTTPS to generativelanguage.googleapis.com with prompts containing 'Act as an expert red-team password analyst' + 'Most Recent Password from dump' + 'generate exactly 20 likely current mutations'
credential_mutation_pattern.context: Operator's ai_sniper_brute.py Gemini prompt template — diagnostic signature of LLM-Personalized Credential Mutation novel TTP. For Google's abuse team prompt-content monitoring.

credential_mutation_pattern.value: Outbound HTTPS to generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models?key=AIzaSy* with high key-diversity from single source IP
credential_mutation_pattern.context: Operator's check_keys.py validation pattern — high key-diversity (40+ distinct AIzaSy* parameter values) from single source IP is operator signal

filesystem_hunt_patterns.value: Markdown files containing '**To:** Gemini CLI' AND '**From:** Gemini CLI' headers
filesystem_hunt_patterns.context: AI Operator Handoff Document signature (C2_INFRA_TRANSFER.md exemplar). Operator-bespoke AI-to-AI framing.

operator_credentials_for_vendor_disclosu.note: All credentials defanged here (first-8 + last-4 chars) per project credential-redaction hygiene rule. Full plaintext in Evidence/russian-arsenal-CREDENTIALS.md for direct vendor T&S disclosure.

gemini_api_keys_stolen.context: Operator's first Gemini API key (same key hardcoded in ai_sniper_brute.py and check_keys.py). 40+ total keys in operator's check_keys.py inventory. All keys require Google T&S revocation.

gemini_api_keys_stolen.value_defanged: 40+ keys total (full list in stage1-malware-analyst.md Section 3.3.2)
gemini_api_keys_stolen.context: Operator's stolen Gemini API key rotation pool. Each key issued to an unidentified victim customer who now bears unauthorized usage charges. Google T&S can identify owning customers from key telemetry.
gemini_api_keys_stolen.ts_recipient: Google Trust & Safety + Google Cloud Security

novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.description: Operator-authored Markdown files written specifically to re-prime new AI agent sessions with full operational context. Treats the AI as a teammate who has lost memory.
exemplars_in_this_campaign: C2_INFRA_TRANSFER.md (explicit '**To:** Gemini CLI / **From:** Gemini CLI' header)
DEPLOYED_TOOLS.md (explicit 'When starting a new session, refer to this file' directive)
novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.novelty_basis: First public artifact-level documentation; existing AI-misuse reporting documents AI-generated content (phishing, code), this documents AI-consumed operator documentation (inverse data flow)
novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.mitre_attack_gap: No clean fit; closest adjacent is T1587 (Develop Capabilities) but qualitatively distinct; propose new MITRE sub-technique post-publication

novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.description: Using a frontier LLM (Gemini 2.5 Flash) at attack time to generate per-target password mutations from email + domain + last-known-password. Replaces hashcat-rules era static password mangling.
exemplars_in_this_campaign: ai_sniper_brute.py with hardcoded Gemini prompt template
AI_ADMIN_MUTANTS.txt (5.5 MB on-disk evidence of mutation output)
novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.novelty_basis: First public artifact-level documentation of operationalized form; academic LLM-for-password-guessing work exists (PassGAN 2017, more recent LLM-based) but no in-the-wild documented cases in mainstream threat-intel reporting
novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.mitre_attack_gap: Maps to T1110 (Brute Force) but the LLM-mutation sub-technique is new; propose T1110.005 (LLM-Generated Credential Mutation) to MITRE

novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.description: Operator's custom A2A C2 backend (c2_server.py) is a Python stdlib BaseHTTPServer with zero authentication on any endpoint, path-traversal vulnerable in file-server endpoint, used in active operations against named victims
exemplars_in_this_campaign: Missing /api/v1/get_results endpoint (client-called but not server-implemented = direct evidence of iterative development)
novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.novelty_basis: Defender-takeover surface is exceptional; custom-rolled unauthenticated C2s used in active operations against named state-owned victims and US healthcare with documented victim machine inventory is rare in published reporting
novel_ttps_anchored_by_this_campaign.mitre_attack_gap: Closest fit T1071.001 (Web Protocols) but unauthenticated-by-design aspect is qualitatively distinct; propose new T1071 sub-technique annotation

ai_augmented_disinformation_operation.content_style: 'Quantum Patriot' Q-style anti-fraud / JD Vance themed; mainstream RSS feeds (Fox/CNN/NYT/Reuters/NBC) reinterpreted through 'patriot' lens
ai_augmented_disinformation_operation.features: Automated 07:00 EST morning greetings, EST prime-time scheduling, anti-duplication logic, Telegram-based remote control (/auto on/off commands)
ai_augmented_disinformation_operation.evidence: Direct posting evidence in session 2026-03-25T18-27-1d86853d.json (Gemini CLI session capturing the operator preparing and posting content)
ai_augmented_disinformation_operation.implication: Same operator runs credential mill + US-targeted Telegram disinformation operation. Cross-domain operator with mixed financial + ideological motivations. Worth Stanford Internet Observatory / DFRLab cross-domain election-disinfo visibility.
